ext_weather.name: Today
ext_weather.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers before 11am, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 11am and 4pm, then showers and thunderstorms likely. Partly sunny. High near 77, with temperatures falling to around 71 in the afternoon. West wind 5 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
